title: qrafty's Mangrove Villages
description: The pack adds rare scattered villages to your mangrove swamps! 🌳
body:
# Ever wanted more life in mangrove swamps? 🌳

This pack adds 15 different structures, connecting to a village scattered around to your mangrove swamps. Explore 10 different buildings providing balanced loot.

**This pack is part of my mainpack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)**
